name: Quick Strike
description: A swift, basic attack that deals minor physical damage. Generates a small amount of combo points.

card_images.description: A simple, polished bronze border. A lithe female rogue with twin daggers lunges forward. One dagger flashes in a silver streak, striking a snarling goblin. In the background, a heavily armored male warrior holds a shield, and a robed mage prepares a spell.

name: Aimed Shot
description: A carefully aimed shot that deals moderate damage. Requires a bow or crossbow.

card_images.description: A simple, polished bronze border. A focused female archer with braided hair kneels, drawing her bowstring taut. The view is from behind her shoulder, looking down the arrow's glowing shaft at a distant, hulking ogre. A female healer in white robes stands nearby, her hands glowing softly.

name: Heavy Blow
description: A powerful, telegraphed strike that deals high physical damage. Requires a two-handed weapon.

card_images.description: A simple, polished bronze border. A muscular female warrior hefts a greatsword high above her head. The massive blade glows with gathered force, about to crash down on a lumbering stone golem. A male mage is visible behind her, chanting with his staff raised.

name: Hamstring
description: Cripples the target, reducing their movement speed by 50% for 8 seconds and dealing minor damage.

card_images.description: A simple, polished bronze border. A female warrior darts low, her shortsword a blur as it slashes across the back of a fleeing wolf-like beast's leg. A red, slowing aura visibly emanates from the wound. Her party, a male tank and a female healer, are seen engaging another beast nearby.

name: Parry
description: Enter a defensive stance for 3 seconds. If you are hit by a melee attack, you parry it, taking no damage and enabling a free, empowered counter-attack.

card_images.description: A simple, polished bronze border. A female knight in polished steel armor holds her longsword in a defensive two-handed grip. A massive troll's crude club swings down, and she meets it with her blade, creating a brilliant explosion of white sparks at the point of impact.

name: Cleave
description: A sweeping attack that strikes your primary target and one additional enemy in front of you.

card_images.description: A simple, polished bronze border. In a wide, powerful arc, a female barbarian swings a massive battle-axe. The silver blur of the weapon connects simultaneously with two armored hobgoblins standing shoulder-to-shoulder. In the background, a male archer nocks another arrow.

name: Serpent Sting
description: Fires a venom-tipped arrow that deals minor initial damage and poisons the target, dealing nature damage over 15 seconds.

card_images.description: A simple, polished bronze border. A female ranger looses an arrow from her darkwood bow. The arrow flies through the air, its head glowing with a sickly green light and leaving a trail of venomous vapor as it speeds towards a giant, multi-eyed spider.

name: Eviscerate
description: A vicious finishing move that consumes all combo points to deal massive damage to a single target.

card_images.description: A simple, polished bronze border. A nimble female rogue, a blur of motion, plunges both of her daggers deep into the back of a staggered, monstrous beast. A visceral spray of crimson light erupts from the wounds. A heavily armored male tank stands in front of the beast, holding its attention.

name: Multi-Shot
description: Fires a spray of arrows in a cone, hitting up to 3 targets. Requires a bow or crossbow.

card_images.description: A simple, polished bronze border. A female archer stands firm, her bow fully drawn. She releases the string, and three glowing arrows fan out from the bow in a cone of light, each one streaking towards a different winged gargoyle perched on a ruin.

name: Sundering Smash
description: A devastating overhead blow that shatters armor, reducing the target's physical defense by 20% for 10 seconds.

card_images.description: A simple, polished bronze border. A powerfully-built female warrior brings a colossal warmaul down upon a heavily-armored, demonic knight. On impact, the demon's chestplate visibly cracks and shatters, sending fragments of dark metal flying. A female healer behind her is surrounded by a protective aura.

name: Battle Trance
description: Enter a focused state. Your critical strike chance is increased by 15%, but your armor is reduced by 10%.

card_images.description: A border of shimmering, crimson light. A female warrior stands amidst the chaos of battle, her body tensed. Her eyes glow with a sharp, focused red light, and a faint crimson aura of pure battle focus surrounds her. Around her, her party—a male mage and a male tank—are locked in combat with shadowy wraiths.

name: Disarm
description: Knocks the weapon from an enemy's hands, drastically reducing their damage dealt for 6 seconds.

card_images.description: A simple, polished bronze border. With a deft and precise movement, a female duelist uses the crossguard of her rapier to hook and twist the massive axe out of an orc warlord's grasp. The axe is shown spinning through the air, momentarily catching the light.

name: Blade Dance
description: Unleash a flurry of strikes, hitting all nearby enemies 3 times over 2 seconds. Also grants 50% dodge chance for the duration.

card_images.description: A simple, polished bronze border. A female warrior with two shortswords becomes a whirlwind of silver light and motion at the center of a group of grotesque ghouls. Countless slash marks appear on all the surrounding monsters simultaneously as her body becomes a graceful, impossible-to-hit blur.

name: Pinning Shot
description: Fires a heavy bolt that pins an enemy to the ground, rooting them for 4 seconds.

card_images.description: A simple, polished bronze border. A female crossbow expert fires a thick, heavy bolt from her siege-like crossbow. The bolt strikes the ground at the feet of a charging, minotaur-like beast, erupting in magical chains of light that bind its legs to the earth, halting it in its tracks.

name: Executioner's Chop
description: A brutal attack that can only be used on targets below 25% health, dealing massive damage.

card_images.description: A simple, polished bronze border. A towering female warrior, wielding a grim, double-headed executioner's axe, stands over a massive, wounded manticore that has fallen to one knee. She raises the axe high, its blade cloaked in dark energy, preparing for the final, brutal strike.

name: Volley
description: Rains arrows down on a target area for 5 seconds, dealing continuous damage to all enemies within it.

card_images.description: A border with flowing, engraved lines that pulse with energy. A female archer kneels, one hand pointing towards the sky as her bow glows with immense power. High above a horde of zombies, a magical sigil appears, from which a continuous, unending shower of glowing arrows rains down. Her party holds the line against any zombies that get too close.

name: Coup de Grâce
description: Find a fatal flaw in the enemy's defense. Your next direct damage ability is a guaranteed critical strike.

card_images.description: A simple, polished bronze border. A keen-eyed female warrior studies a colossal, armored dragon. As she watches, a single, glowing red weak point appears in the gaps of the dragon's scales on its chest. Her own eyes narrow with focus as she prepares her next attack, while her party members distract the beast.

name: Earthshatter
description: Slams a two-handed weapon into the ground, sending a shockwave that damages and stuns all enemies in a frontal cone for 3 seconds.

card_images.description: A simple, polished bronze border. A female titan in heavy plate armor slams her massive hammer into the cavern floor. The ground cracks and erupts before her, sending a powerful, cone-shaped shockwave of rock and dust hurtling towards a group of stunned, insectoid monsters.

name: Kill Shot
description: An instant, high-damage shot that can only be used on enemies below 20% health.

card_images.description: A simple, polished bronze border. A female sharpshooter aims her ornate crossbow at a huge, heavily wounded chimera. A brilliant, crimson energy gathers at the tip of the bolt just as she fires. The bolt becomes a streak of red light, aimed directly at the beast's heart.

name: Storm of a Thousand Cuts
description: The ultimate martial technique. Unleashes a blindingly fast series of strikes against a single target, dealing catastrophic damage over 5 seconds. You are immune to crowd control while channeling.

card_images.description: A border with flowing, engraved lines that pulse with energy. A female master swordswoman stands before a towering demon lord, her two katanas a mere blur. The demon is completely encased in a cage of impossibly fast, silver sword strikes, each one creating a flash of light on its body. She is a still point in the center of a storm of her own making, while her awestruck party watches from behind.
